ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vehicle */,
  "manufactured_date" TEXT /* Date the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the vehicle */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next maintenance */,
  "total_distance_traveled" REAL /* Total distance traveled by the vehicle */,
  "operational_hours" REAL /* Total operational hours of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the sensor */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., GPS, LIDAR, IMU) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the sensor */,
  "calibration_interval" INTEGER /* Interval at which the sensor needs calibration */,
  "last_calibration_by" TEXT /* User who last calibrated the sensor */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_sensors" (
  "vehicle_sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle-sensor mapping */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the sensor is installed on */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor installed on the vehicle */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed on the vehicle */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Current calibration status of the sensor */,
  "calibration_due_date" TEXT /* Date the next calibration is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_sensors_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_sensors_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_streams" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data stream */,
  "stream_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the data stream */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data stream */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the stream (e.g., position, velocity, heading) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data stream */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency at which data is collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_streams" (
  "sensor_stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor-stream mapping */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor the stream is associated with */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data stream */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the stream started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the stream ended (if applicable) */,
  "last_data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the last data point collected from the stream */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data stream */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_streams_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES data_streams ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_streams_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "sensor_stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor-stream the data point belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "value_left_position" REAL /* Value of the left position */,
  "value_right_position" REAL /* Value of the right position */,
  "value_left_velocity" REAL /* Value of the left velocity */,
  "value_right_velocity" REAL /* Value of the right velocity */,
  "value_heading" REAL /* Value of the heading */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the data point */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data point (e.g., sensor, simulation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_sensor_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_stream_id") REFERENCES sensor_streams ("sensor_stream_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the metric is associated with */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the metric */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the performance metric was recorded */,
  "test_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the performance was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_performance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the simulation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the simulation is associated with */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the simulation was run */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the control algorithm used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_data" (
  "simulation_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation data point */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the data point belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "value_left_position" REAL /* Value of the left position */,
  "value_right_position" REAL /* Value of the right position */,
  "value_left_velocity" REAL /* Value of the left velocity */,
  "value_right_velocity" REAL /* Value of the right velocity */,
  "value_heading" REAL /* Value of the heading */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the data point */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data point (e.g., sensor, simulation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_data_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the last activity */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data point */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
